learn.core_idea: Latency tuning changes timing but should not violate correctness invariants.
mechanism_steps: Confirm fs_ok and completion still hold.
learn.worked_example: Disk/terminal delays alter when events occur, not whether invariants pass.
common_mistakes: Treating slower run as incorrect run.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can apply latency config commands.
I can verify fs_ok remains true.
